meta.title: Pwn2Own Miami ... $250K for ICS Exploits
meta.description:
Brian Gorenc and Abdul-Aziz Hariri of ZDI join Dale Peterson to discuss the Pwn2Own Miami event. 30 0Day ICS vulnerabilities were exploited by the contestants to earn almost $300K.

0:00 Dale's opening monologue on when vulnerabilities matter and don't matter in ICS, and how this ties into the community being ready for Pwn2Own

8:10 The interview with Brian and Abdul

46:46 ZDI's cool video on Pwn2Own Miami
